question_text: A particle moving in a circle of radius R with uniform speed takes time T to complete one revolution. If this particle is projected with the same speed at an angle ūĚúÉ to the horizontal, the maximum height attained by it is equal to 4*R. The angle of projection ūĚúÉ is then given by : (1) sin-1 2*gT2 ūĚúč2*R 1 2*(2) sin-1 ūĚúč2*R^2*gT2 1 2*(3) cos-1 2*gT2 ūĚúč2*R 1 2*(4) cos-1 ūĚúčR 2*gT2 1 2
